title: polygala major
intro: Polygala major, also known as common polygala or major polygala, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Polygalaceae. It has been traditionally used in various herbal remedies due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polygala major are attributed to its ability to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to support the immune system and reduce stress levels. In herbal preparations, Polygala major is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, where it is combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and create a holistic approach to health and wellness.
